rejection_reason: tone: forbidden_phrase_start — email opens with 'I hope you're doing well'. Generic pleasantry that adds no value and signals the email was not personalized for this recipient.
text:
Subject: A quick idea for {{company}}

Hey {{first_name}},

I hope you're doing well! I came across {{company}} and thought FlowAI could be a great fit for your team.

FlowAI saves professionals an average of 2 hours per day by automating repetitive tasks and integrating with 50+ tools.

Would love to chat. Are you free for 15 minutes this week?
